authors: Luiz Peres-Neto Santiago Giraldo Luque Juan Pablo Soriano Gatica a Department of Journalism and Communication Sciences
Spainb Department of Public Law and Historical and Legal Sciences
raw_title: Accountability Sabotage and Journalism: Digital Authoritarian Practices and Chilling Effect in Latin America
title_en: Accountability Sabotage and Journalism: Digital Authoritarian Practices and Chilling Effect in Latin America
title_zh: 问责破坏与新闻业：拉丁美洲的数字威权实践与寒蝉效应
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了在拉丁美洲，数字威权主义如何通过破坏问责机制来影响新闻业，导致记者自我审查的寒蝉效应。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how digital authoritarianism in Latin America affects journalism by undermining accountability mechanisms, leading to a chilling effect where journalists self-censor.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字威权主义对新闻业的影响，特别是在拉丁美洲背景下，关注问责机制破坏和寒蝉效应的相互作用。
research_direction_en: Investigating the impact of digital authoritarianism on journalism, particularly in the Latin American context, focusing on the interplay between accountability sabotage and chilling effects.
